comment: 32yo female, asymptomatic, confirmed germline MEN1 pathogenic variant (c.249_252delGTCT, p.Ile85Serfs*33) on family-cascade panel after sister's diagnosis of insulinoma at 28. No personal cancer diagnosis, no current biochemical evidence of MEN1-spectrum tumor. Engine fires RF-MEN1-CONFIRMED-CARRIER → routes to PreventionPlan: standard = IND-MEN1-CARRIER-SURVEILLANCE (annual PTH/Ca/prolactin/IGF-1/CgA, pituitary MRI q3y, abdominal MRI q1y); aggressive = IND-MEN1-CARRIER-INTENSIFIED (+ Zollinger-Ellison surveillance, prophylactic-parathyroidectomy shared decision). Validates v0.2-B MEN1 confirmed-carrier pilot.
